content: React Flow (@xyflow/react) is the standard library for interactive node graphs in React. Performance strategies for large graphs: (1) onlyRenderVisibleElements for virtualization, (2) wrap custom node/edge components in React.memo, (3) useCallback for event handlers, (4) separate selected node state to avoid re-rendering all nodes, (5) avoid inline node object creation. Dagre.js integrates as auto-layout engine for DAGs. d3-dag is a more advanced alternative. Custom nodes preferred over built-in nodes for flexible UI. Connection leak risk: avoid direct import in SSR without guards.
